mapper.select: SELECT id, group_code, code, code_name, code_value, sort_order, use_yn, attr1, attr2, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by FROM common_code WHERE group_code = #{groupCode} AND use_yn = true ORDER BY sort_order ASC, code ASC
SELECT DISTINCT group_code FROM common_code ORDER BY group_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO common_code (group_code, code, code_name, code_value, sort_order, use_yn, attr1, attr2, created_at, created_by) VALUES (#{groupCode}, #{code}, #{codeName}, #{codeValue}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn}, #{attr1}, #{attr2}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM common_code WHERE group_code=#{groupCode} AND code=#{code}
